trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h candle close above $1.07 or clear bounce from $1.06 support

Price-volume divergence (falling price with low volume = weak selling)
EXTREME negative funding rate (0th percentile, shorts paying longs)
EXTREME short crowd (4th percentile L/S ratio, contrarian bullish)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: RSI 4h oversold, price at 7d low/support, price-volume divergence, extremely negative funding rate, and extreme short crowd combine for a strong short squeeze setup. These 5+ aligned contrarian signals indicate a high probability reversal.
Extremely tight price range and minimal ATR_24h expected movement ($0.04-$0.04) make it unfeasible to define a trade with a reasonable risk/reward.
